special_mechanics.name: 8-way rotary joystick control (arcade)
special_mechanics.description: Original arcade version featured 8-way rotary joystick allowing character rotation while moving in different direction

special_mechanics.name: NES fire-button facing lock
special_mechanics.description: NES version emulates arcade controls by locking character facing direction while fire button is depressed

special_mechanics.name: Armor/damage system
special_mechanics.description: Armor allows player to take limited number of hits without time expiration; replaced vehicle mechanic from original

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Sources describe game as 'sluggish' with 'near impossible action' but contain no quantified physics parameters. Movement mechanics documented only in functional/design terms (control scheme, armor system, weapon mechanics) rather than numerical values.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Ikari Warriors II: Victory Road (NES)
